arguments.code:
def permute_string(s):
    import itertools
    return [''.join(p) for p in itertools.permutations(s)]

permute_string('ab')

arguments.answer:
def permute_string(s):
    import itertools
    return [''.join(p) for p in itertools.permutations(s)]

permute_string('ab')
